name: negative-bar
description: Bar chart displaying both positive and negative values with color differentiation

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: X-axis labels. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. Example: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'] or [{label: 'Jan', value: 0}, {label: 'Feb', value: 1}]

data.name: data
data.description: Array of numeric values, can include negative numbers. Example: [100, 200, 150, 300]

positiveColor.name: positiveColor
positiveColor.description: Color for positive values. If not provided, uses theme color. Example: '#10b981'

negativeColor.name: negativeColor
negativeColor.description: Color for negative values. If not provided, uses theme color. Example: '#ef4444'

barWidth.name: barWidth
barWidth.description: Width of the bars as a percentage string. Example: '40%'

barGap.name: barGap
barGap.description: Gap between bars as a percentage string. Example: '10%'

borderRadius.name: borderRadius
borderRadius.description: Border radius for each corner of the bars [topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft]. Example: [4, 4, 4, 4]

showLabels.name: showLabels
showLabels.description: Whether to show category labels on the bars. Example: true

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}
